name: devflows
description: Reusable developer workflows for git publishing and cleanup reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable workflows for git and review cleanup tasks.
interface.longDescription: Reusable developer workflows for fast commit-and-push flows, strict maintainability reviews, and cleanup reviews for active diffs from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Yeet the current repo changes with a commit message.
Review the current diff for duplication, code quality, and efficiency issues, then clean it up.
Run a super review on the current branch.
